Dashboard.surveyProductDescription: Help us prioritize new features for the next release.

SurveyBuilder.title: Survey Builder
SurveyBuilder.estimatedTime: Estimated time to complete the survey
SurveyBuilder.addPageDescription: Pages help organize long surveys into sections
SurveyBuilder.datasetNoticeText: Responses to this survey will be de-identified and added to our Open Dataset Marketplace. This helps us keep the platform free for everyone.
SurveyBuilder.configureBeforePublish: Configure visibility and dataset options before publishing.
SurveyBuilder.firstPublishWarning: Once published, dataset sharing settings will be locked. Non-public surveys cannot be switched to public later.
SurveyBuilder.visibilityPublic: Visible to everyone in the marketplace
SurveyBuilder.publicDatasetNote: Public surveys must contribute to the dataset marketplace.
SurveyBuilder.nonPublicDatasetNote: Non-public surveys can opt-in to contribute to the dataset marketplace.
SurveyBuilder.pointsRewardDescription: The system grants base points. You can spend N points per completed response; respondents earn +N/3 extra points.
SurveyBuilder.logicWarningDeleted: Logic jump points to a deleted question
SurveyBuilder.logicWarningBackwards: Logic jump points to a question before or at current position
SurveyBuilder.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe what this survey is about...
SurveyBuilder.visibilityPublicDescription: Visible in marketplace and searchable by search engines.
SurveyBuilder.settingsLockedAfterPublish: These settings are locked after the first publish.
SurveyBuilder.datasetEnrollmentNotice: is mandatory for free users publishing {visibility} surveys. Upgrade to Pro to publish public surveys without contributing data.
SurveyBuilder.questionsBelowLine: Questions below this line will appear on this page
SurveyBuilder.emptyCanvasTitle: Drag items here from the toolbox
SurveyBuilder.deletePageDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this page and all questions inside it? This action cannot be undone.
SurveyBuilder.deleteQuestionDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this question? This action cannot be undone.

ConsentModal.title: Data Usage Consent
ConsentModal.description: Before you start building, please note how your survey data will be used:
ConsentModal.deidentificationText: All survey responses are automatically de-identified to protect participant privacy.
ConsentModal.marketplaceText: By default, de-identified datasets are contributed to our Open Marketplace to keep Surtopya free.
ConsentModal.paidOptoutText: Pro users can opt-out of data sharing for non-public surveys.

SurveyRenderer.thankYou: Thank you for completing this survey!
SurveyRenderer.previewWatermark: This is a preview. Responses will not be saved.
SurveyRenderer.previewBanner: Preview Mode - Responses are not saved

Datasets.title: Dataset Marketplace
Datasets.description: Explore and access high-quality de-identified datasets to power your research and development.
Datasets.heroDescription: Discover high-quality de-identified datasets curated by the community.
Datasets.openDatasetNoticeText: Datasets shared here are de-identified and aggregated to protect respondent privacy.
Datasets.doiHelp: Digital Object Identifier (DOI) provides a unique and persistent identifier for this dataset, making it easy to cite and reference.
Datasets.apiDescription: Access this dataset programmatically via our RESTful API.
Datasets.streamingDescription: Stream large JSON payloads directly into your data pipeline for fast integration.
Datasets.scrollHint: Scroll horizontally to view full content

Explore.title: Explore
Explore.description: Discover paid surveys, share your opinions, and earn points. Join thousands of respondents.
Explore.checkBackLater: Check back later for new surveys

Pricing.title: Simple, Transparent
Pricing.description: Choose the plan that fits your research needs. No hidden fees.

About.title: About
About.missionText: Surtopya is a privacy-preserving survey platform that connects researchers with quality data while protecting user privacy.
About.forResearchersText: Create surveys, collect responses, and access de-identified datasets from our marketplace.
About.forParticipantsText: Share your opinions, earn points, and know your data is protected.
About.privacyFirstText: All data is automatically de-identified before being shared or stored.
About.subtitle: Bridging the gap between researchers and respondents through a fair, transparent, and rewarding marketplace.
About.intro: Surtopya was born from a simple observation: getting high-quality survey responses is hard, and filling out surveys often feels unrewarding. We set out to change that.
About.whyQualityText: Our verification systems ensure you get real answers from real people.
About.whyRewardsText: We pass on the majority of fees directly to the respondents.
About.whyAssetsText: Your data isn't just a one-time report; it's an asset that grows in value.

Errors.notFoundDescription: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
Errors.serverErrorDescription: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again later.
Errors.unauthorizedDescription: You need to be logged in to access this page.
Errors.forbiddenDescription: You don't have permission to access this resource.

Home.heroSubtitle: The premium marketplace for high-quality survey data. Create, distribute, and analyze with ease.
Home.featureOneDescription: Drag-and-drop builder with advanced logic and premium templates.
Home.featureTwoDescription: Access a worldwide pool of verified respondents instantly.
Home.featureThreeDescription: Real-time analytics and exportable reports for deep analysis.

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.description: Manage your account preferences and application settings.
Settings.notificationsDescription: Control how you receive updates and survey invitations.
Settings.emailNotificationsDescription: Receive survey results and account alerts via email.
Settings.surveyInvitationsDescription: Be notified when new surveys matching your profile are available.
Settings.marketingUpdatesDescription: Get news about new features and promotions.
Settings.privacyDescription: Manage your data visibility and privacy settings.
Settings.publicProfileDescription: Show your profile to other researchers and survey creators.
Settings.dataSharingDescription: Anonymously share your responses for larger market studies.
Settings.appearanceDescription: Personalize the visual language of Surtopya.
Settings.darkModeDescription: Toggle between light and dark themes.
Settings.languageDescription: Choose your preferred language for the interface.
Settings.deleteAccountDescription: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action is irreversible.
